title: crepidomanes erosum
intro: Crepidomanes erosum, also known as the Forked Thelypteris or Forked Fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepidomanes erosum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused in water, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules.
